list.name: Changes
list.comment:
## Summary
This commit introduces merge of core radio player functionality and integrates it with the schedule screen. It also improves UI consistency and fixes a few mobile-specific issues.
### Schedule UI/UX - Share and cache **cover art** between the player and the schedule screen - Align the schedule **logo left offset** with the player app bar - Keep the schedule action icon **touch target** consistent - Animate the schedule **waveform** with moving bars - Add a **playback control FAB** (waveform FAB) to the schedule screen - Add a **schedule header logo** and align the mode switch icons
### Stability & edge cases - Fix **mobile overflow** in the About dialog content - Show the player splash screen **only once per app launch** - Add a safe **cover placeholder** during fast view switching
### Theme / styling - Fix the app theme to use the **orange schedule color scheme**

task.summary:
## Summary
This commit introduces merge of core radio player functionality and integrates it with the schedule screen. It also improves UI consistency and fixes a few mobile-specific issues.
### Schedule UI/UX - Share and cache **cover art** between the player and the schedule screen - Align the schedule **logo left offset** with the player app bar - Keep the schedule action icon **touch target** consistent - Animate the schedule **waveform** with moving bars - Add a **playback control FAB** (waveform FAB) to the schedule screen - Add a **schedule header logo** and align the mode switch icons
### Stability & edge cases - Fix **mobile overflow** in the About dialog content - Show the player splash screen **only once per app launch** - Add a safe **cover placeholder** during fast view switching
### Theme / styling - Fix the app theme to use the **orange schedule color scheme**

## Summary
This commit introduces merge of core radio player functionality and integrates it with the schedule screen. It also improves UI consistency and fixes a few mobile-specific issues.
### Schedule UI/UX - Share and cache **cover art** between the player and the schedule screen - Align the schedule **logo left offset** with the player app bar - Keep the schedule action icon **touch target** consistent - Animate the schedule **waveform** with moving bars - Add a **playback control FAB** (waveform FAB) to the schedule screen - Add a **schedule header logo** and align the mode switch icons
### Stability & edge cases - Fix **mobile overflow** in the About dialog content - Show the player splash screen **only once per app launch** - Add a safe **cover placeholder** during fast view switching
### Theme / styling - Fix the app theme to use the **orange schedule color scheme**

MESSAGE.value:
## Summary
This commit introduces merge of core radio player functionality and integrates it with the schedule screen. It also improves UI consistency and fixes a few mobile-specific issues.
### Schedule UI/UX - Share and cache **cover art** between the player and the schedule screen - Align the schedule **logo left offset** with the player app bar - Keep the schedule action icon **touch target** consistent - Animate the schedule **waveform** with moving bars - Add a **playback control FAB** (waveform FAB) to the schedule screen - Add a **schedule header logo** and align the mode switch icons
### Stability & edge cases - Fix **mobile overflow** in the About dialog content - Show the player splash screen **only once per app launch** - Add a safe **cover placeholder** during fast view switching
### Theme / styling - Fix the app theme to use the **orange schedule color scheme**

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
## Summary
This commit introduces merge of core radio player functionality and integrates it with the schedule screen. It also improves UI consistency and fixes a few mobile-specific issues.
### Schedule UI/UX - Share and cache **cover art** between the player and the schedule screen - Align the schedule **logo left offset** with the player app bar - Keep the schedule action icon **touch target** consistent - Animate the schedule **waveform** with moving bars - Add a **playback control FAB** (waveform FAB) to the schedule screen - Add a **schedule header logo** and align the mode switch icons
### Stability & edge cases - Fix **mobile overflow** in the About dialog content - Show the player splash screen **only once per app launch** - Add a safe **cover placeholder** during fast view switching
### Theme / styling - Fix the app theme to use the **orange schedule color scheme**
